query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `categories` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `slug` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `icon` varchar(64), `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), CONSTRAINT `categories_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `categories_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`))
